raw_consumer_statement:
On XXXX XXXX of XXXX 2 purchases were made on my Citi Wayfair card totaling {$91.00}.

Citi claims they have done 3 investigations into this matter all making responsible for these purchases.

I spoke with a member from wayfair who with in 5 minutes was able to trace the up address for the purchases to a location in Illinois ; I live in Ohio.

Citi told me that I would need to file a police report which I did. Still trying to hold me responsible.
